recommendations.title: Menace II Society
recommendations.overview: A young street hustler attempts to escape the rigors and temptations of the ghetto in a quest for a better life.

recommendations.title: The Book of Eli
recommendations.overview: A post-apocalyptic tale, in which a lone man fights his way across America in order to protect a sacred book that holds the secrets to saving humankind.

recommendations.title: Dead Presidents
recommendations.overview: On the streets they call cash dead presidents. And that's just what a Vietnam veteran is after when he returns home from the war only to find himself drawn into a life of crime. With the aid of his fellow vets he plans the ultimate heist -- a daring

recommendations.title: From Hell
recommendations.overview: Frederick Abberline is an opium-huffing inspector from Scotland Yard who falls for one of Jack the Ripper's prostitute targets in this Hughes brothers adaption of a graphic novel that posits the Ripper's true identity.

recommendations.title: Manchester by the Sea
recommendations.overview: After his older brother passes away, Lee Chandler is forced to return home to care for his 16-year-old nephew. There he is compelled to deal with a tragic past that separated him from his family and the community where he was born and raised.

recommendations.title: 10,000 BC
recommendations.overview: A prehistoric epic that follows a young mammoth hunter's journey through uncharted territory to secure the future of his tribe.

recommendations.title: The Butterfly Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man struggles to access sublimated childhood memories. He finds a technique that allows him to travel back into the past, to occupy his childhood body and change history. However, he soon finds that every change he makes has unexpected conseq

recommendations.title: The Feels
recommendations.overview: A lesbian bachelorette weekend goes awry when one of the brides admits she's never had an orgasm.

recommendations.title: Quest for Fire
recommendations.overview: In the prehistoric world, a Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge to start a new fire, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest for more. With the tribe's future at stake, th

recommendations.title: A Dog's Way Home
recommendations.overview: The adventure of Bella, a dog who embarks on an epic 400-mile journey home after she is separated from her beloved human.
